category_sources: source_facts.description: Phar Installation and Verification Environment (PHIVE)
display_name_sources: source_facts.description expands the display name as PHIVE; source_facts.name is phive
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official PHAR/PHIVE site; source_facts.repo is the official README source
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/phar-io/phive; per instruction repo is returned as null
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies PHAR installation and verification; source_facts.executables lists a CLI executable
